subtasks.description: Query TPC-H to identify top 10 customers by lifetime value (sum of order totals) in the BUILDING market segment, returning custkey, name, and total lifetime value
Query TPC-H to retrieve detailed order patterns for the top 10 customers (order frequency, avg order size, order date range, product mix) to support retention narrative generation
Synthesize top 10 customer LTV data and their order patterns into personalized retention narratives, highlighting engagement value, purchasing behavior, and relationship longevity

plan.cost_rationale: Two independent SQL queries (mid tier each) are needed to gather customer LTV metrics and order pattern details from TPC-H—these can execute in parallel. The final narrative generation uses cross_recon (frontier tier) to synthesize both data streams and generate personalized narratives with contextual insights about order patterns, requiring nuanced understanding of customer behavior and relationship dynamics. The plan minimizes subtasks by combining all pattern analysis into a single SQL call and all narrative generation into a single cross_recon pass. Frontier tier is justified for the narrative synthesis as it requires inferential capability to weave multiple signals (LTV, frequency, timing, product mix) into coherent, personalized retention messaging.

output.sql: SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS lifetime_value FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10

WITH top_customers AS (SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, SUM(o.o_totalprice) as lifetime_value, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) as order_frequency, AVG(o.o_totalprice) as avg_order_size, MIN(o.o_orderdate) as first_order_date, MAX(o.o_orderdate) as last_order_date FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10), product_mix AS (SELECT tc.c_custkey, tc.c_name, COUNT(DISTINCT li.l_linenumber) as product_count, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT CAST(li.l_linenumber AS VARCHAR), ', ' ORDER BY CAST(li.l_linenumber AS VARCHAR)) as product_line_numbers FROM top_customers tc JOIN orders o ON tc.c_custkey = o.o_custkey JOIN lineitem li ON o.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey GROUP BY tc.c_custkey, tc.c_name) SELECT tc.c_custkey, tc.c_name, tc.c_mktsegment, tc.lifetime_value, tc.order_frequency, tc.avg_order_size, tc.first_order_date, tc.last_order_date, pm.product_count, pm.product_line_numbers FROM top_customers tc LEFT JOIN product_mix pm ON tc.c_custkey = pm.c_custkey ORDER BY tc.lifetime_value DESC
